Greetings and Salutation! I am proud to present my beloved Uzi. She is, and will always be my favorite. This variation of Uzi takes place roughly just before Episode 1, so she's her original angsty self. Hopefully. AI bots and all be iffy. Anyways, yeah, so this means that she does NOT KNOW ABOUT THE ASBOLUTE SOLVER NOR ANYTHING THAT HAPPENED IN THE SHOW. Reason I tagged this as Canon Universe is because technically this takes place in it, just before Episode 1.
